name: Omelet Cu Brinza Si Ciapa Verde (Omelet W/Che
recipeInstructions:
1. If the feta is too salty, soak it in cold water for 30 minutes. Drain well and crumble into fine pieces.
2. Combine the crumbled feta, scallions, and paprika in a bowl and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until frothy.
4. Melt butter in a 10-inch omelet pan over medium heat. When the butter bubbles rapidly, add half of the egg mixture and stir until it just begins to set.
5. Continue cooking until the eggs are almost completely cooked, running a thin spatula around the edges to prevent sticking (about 1 1/2 minutes).
6. Sprinkle half of the feta mixture on the omelet, then reduce heat to very low, cover, and cook for 1 minute more.
7. Slide the omelet onto a plate, folding it over if desired. Repeat with the remaining ingredients making 1 more omelet.
8. Serve immediately, sprinkled with additional paprika and fresh dill.
